{"messageId":"019e826d19eb767d9c54a08e4d5886c1","rawEvent":{"message_id":"019e826d19eb767d9c54a08e4d5886c1","conversation_id":"019e8251e61f7c7297ae8fab38b85984","content":"找到问题了！`config.go` 只读取了配置文件，**没有读取环境变量**。\n\n`viper` 默认不会自动读取环境变量，需要显式配置。让我修复 `config.go`："},"timestamp":1780304658,"type":"TEXT_MESSAGE_CONTENT"}

{"rawEvent":{"message_id":"019e826d19eb767d9c54a08e4d5886c1","conversation_id":"019e8251e61f7c7297ae8fab38b85984","tool_call_id":"functions.replace_in_file:14","document":{"file_path":"E:/myproject/stock-v3/backend/config/config.go","sub_content":"config.go","sub_content_event":"open_editor","sub_content_event_value":"E:/myproject/stock-v3/backend/config/config.go","sub_content_tip":"E:/myproject/stock-v3/backend/config/config.go","old_string":"func LoadConfig() (*Config, error) {
	viper.SetConfigName("config")
	viper.SetConfigType("yaml")
	viper.AddConfigPath("./config")
	viper.AddConfigPath(".")

	// 设置默认值
	viper.SetDefault("server.port", "8080")
	viper.SetDefault("server.mode", "debug")
	viper.SetDefault("server.read_timeout", 30)
	viper.SetDefault("server.write_timeout", 30)

	viper.SetDefault("database.host", "localhost")
	viper.SetDefault("database.port", "5432")
	viper.SetDefault("database.user", "postgres")
	viper.SetDefault("database.password", "password")
	viper.SetDefault("database.dbname", "stock_strategy")
	viper.SetDefault("database.sslmode", "disable")

	viper.SetDefault("strategy.daily_update_time", "17:45")
	viper.SetDefault("strategy.strategy_run_time", "18:00")
	viper.SetDefault("strategy.weekend_skip", true)

	if err := viper.ReadInConfig(); err != nil {
		log.Printf("Warning: 无法读取配置文件，使用默认值: %v", err)
	}

	var config Config
	if err := viper.Unmarshal(&config); err != nil {
		return nil, err
	}

	return &config, nil
}","new_string":"func LoadConfig() (*Config, error) {
	viper.SetConfigName("config")
	viper.SetConfigType("yaml")
	viper.AddConfigPath("./config")
	viper.AddConfigPath(".")

	// 设置环境变量支持（优先级高于配置文件）
	viper.AutomaticEnv()
	viper.SetEnvPrefix("") // 无前缀，直接匹配环境变量名

	// 绑定环境变量名（将 viper key 映射到环境变量名）
	_ = viper.BindEnv("server.port", "SERVER_PORT")
	_ = viper.BindEnv("server.mode", "SERVER_MODE")

	_ = viper.BindEnv("database.host", "DB_HOST")
	_ = viper.BindEnv("database.port", "DB_PORT")
	_ = viper.BindEnv("database.user", "DB_USER")
	_ = viper.BindEnv("database.password", "DB_PASSWORD")
	_ = viper.BindEnv("database.dbname", "DB_NAME")
	_ = viper.BindEnv("database.sslmode", "DB_SSLMODE")

	_ = viper.BindEnv("redis.host", "REDIS_HOST")
	_ = viper.BindEnv("redis.port", "REDIS_PORT")
	_ = viper.BindEnv("redis.password", "REDIS_PASSWORD")
	_ = viper.BindEnv("redis.db", "REDIS_DB")

	// 设置默认值
	viper.SetDefault("server.port", "8080")
	viper.SetDefault("server.mode", "debug")
	viper.SetDefault("server.read_timeout", 30)
	viper.SetDefault("server.write_timeout", 30)

	viper.SetDefault("database.host", "localhost")
	viper.SetDefault("database.port", "5432")
	viper.SetDefault("database.user", "postgres")
	viper.SetDefault("database.password", "password")
	viper.SetDefault("database.dbname", "stock_strategy")
	viper.SetDefault("database.sslmode", "disable")

	viper.SetDefault("redis.host", "localhost")
	viper.SetDefault("redis.port", "6379")
	viper.SetDefault("redis.password", "")
	viper.SetDefault("redis.db", 0)

	viper.SetDefault("strategy.daily_update_time", "17:45")
	viper.SetDefault("strategy.strategy_run_time", "18:00")
	viper.SetDefault("strategy.weekend_skip", true)

	if err := viper.ReadInConfig(); err != nil {
		log.Printf("Warning: 无法读取配置文件，使用默认值: %v", err)
	}

	var config Config
	if err := viper.Unmarshal(&config); err != nil {
		return nil, err
	}

	return &config, nil
}","apply_mode":"apply_only"}},"timestamp":1780304660,"type":"TOOL_CALL_ARGS"}

{"messageId":"019e826d19eb767d9c54a08e4d5886c1","rawEvent":{"message_id":"019e826d19eb767d9c54a08e4d5886c1","conversation_id":"019e8251e61f7c7297ae8fab38b85984","content":"---

## 问题原因

后端 `config.go` 只从 `config.yaml` 文件读取配置，**没有读取环境变量**。Docker 容器中：

- `config.yaml` 里的数据库 host 是 `localhost`
- 容器内 `localhost` 指向自己，而不是 postgres 容器
- docker-compose 设置的环境变量（如 `DB_HOST=postgres`）没有被读取

---

## 已修复

修改了 `backend/config/config.go`，添加了：

1. `viper.AutomaticEnv()` — 自动读取环境变量
2. `viper.BindEnv()` — 将环境变量绑定到配置字段

这样环境变量的优先级高于配置文件，Docker 中设置的 `DB_HOST=postgres` 等变量就能生效了。

---

## 重新部署

```bash
cd /home/way/stock-v3/deploy
docker-compose down
docker-compose build --no-cache backend
docker-compose up -d
```

---

## 验证修复

查看后端日志确认连接成功：

```bash
docker logs -f stock-strategy-backend
```

正常应该看到：
```
服务器启动在端口 8080
```

而不是：
```
dial tcp [::1]:5432: connect: connection refused
```"},"timestamp":1780304715,"type":"TEXT_MESSAGE_CONTENT"}

{"type":"TOOL_CALL_RESULT","timestamp":1780301036,"rawEvent":{"message_id":"019e8235e96b78d69db8ba7c9f6719ea","conversation_id":"019e8235abe37fb686d64a3a06b3af83","tool_call_id":"functions.read_file:0","result":{},"display_name":"读取文件"},"messageId":"019e8235e96b78d69db8ba7c9f6719ea","toolCallId":"functions.read_file:0","content":"{\"content\": \"import { createRouter, createWebHistory } from 'vue-router'\\n\\n// 导入页面组件\\nimport Dashboard from '../views/Dashboard.vue'\\nimport StockList from '../views/stocks/StockList.vue'\\nimport StockSearch from '../views/stocks/StockSearch.vue'\\nimport Industries from '../views/stocks/Industries.vue'\\nimport ShortTermStrategy from '../views/strategies/ShortTermStrategy.vue'\\nimport MediumTermStrategy from '../views/strategies/MediumTermStrategy.vue'\\nimport LongTermStrategy from '../views/strategies/LongTermStrategy.vue'\\nimport StrategyHistory from '../views/strategies/StrategyHistory.vue'\\nimport SectorFundFlow from '../views/fund-flow/SectorFundFlow.vue'\\nimport FundFlowTrend from '../views/fund-flow/FundFlowTrend.vue'\\nimport FundFlowSummary from '../views/fund-flow/FundFlowSummary.vue'\\nimport Settings from '../views/Settings.vue'\\n\\nconst routes = [\\n {\\n path: '/',\\n redirect: '/dashboard'\\n },\\n {\\n path: '/dashboard',\\n name: 'Dashboard',\\n component: Dashboard,\\n meta: {\\n title: '仪表盘',\\n icon: 'House'\\n }\\n },\\n // 股票管理路由\\n {\\n path: '/stocks',\\n redirect: '/stocks/list'\\n },\\n {\\n path: '/stocks/list',\\n name: 'StockList',\\n component: StockList,\\n meta: {\\n title: '股票列表',\\n icon: 'List'\\n }\\n },\\n {\\n path: '/stocks/search',\\n name: 'StockSearch',\\n component: StockSearch,\\n meta: {\\n title: '股票搜索',\\n icon: 'Search'\\n }\\n },\\n {\\n path: '/stocks/industries',\\n name: 'Industries',\\n component: Industries,\\n meta: {\\n title: '行业分类',\\n icon: 'Grid'\\n }\\n },\\n // 策略分析路由\\n {\\n path: '/strategies',\\n redirect: '/strategies/short-term'\\n },\\n {\\n path: '/strategies/short-term',\\n name: 'ShortTermStrategy',\\n component: ShortTermStrategy,\\n meta: {\\n title: '短线策略',\\n icon: 'Lightning'\\n }\\n },\\n {\\n path: '/strategies/medium-term',\\n name: 'MediumTermStrategy',\\n component: MediumTermStrategy,\\n meta: {\\n title: '中线策略',\\n icon: 'TrendCharts'\\n }\\n },\\n {\\n path: '/strategies/long-term',\\n name: 'LongTermStrategy',\\n component: LongTermStrategy,\\n meta: {\\n title: '长线策略',\\n icon: 'Clock'\\n }\\n },\\n {\\n path: '/strategies/history',\\n name: 'StrategyHistory',\\n component: StrategyHistory,\\n meta: {\\n title: '策略历史',\\n icon: 'Document'\\n }\\n },\\n // 资金流向路由\\n {\\n path: '/fund-flow',\\n redirect: '/fund-flow/sectors'\\n },\\n {\\n path: '/fund-flow/sectors',\\n name: 'SectorFundFlow',\\n component: SectorFundFlow,\\n meta: {\\n title: '板块资金流',\\n icon: 'Money'\\n }\\n },\\n {\\n path: '/fund-flow/trend',\\n name: 'FundFlowTrend',\\n component: FundFlowTrend,\\n meta: {\\n title: '资金流趋势',\\n icon: 'TrendCharts'\\n }\\n },\\n {\\n path: '/fund-flow/summary',\\n name: 'FundFlowSummary',\\n component: FundFlowSummary,\\n meta: {\\n title: '资金流摘要',\\n icon: 'Summary'\\n }\\n },\\n // 系统设置\\n {\\n path: '/settings',\\n name: 'Settings',\\n component: Settings,\\n meta: {\\n title: '系统设置',\\n icon: 'Setting'\\n }\\n }\\n]\\n\\nconst router = createRouter({\\n history: createWebHistory(),\\n routes\\n})\\n\\n// 路由守卫\\nrouter.beforeEach((to, from, next) => {\\n // 设置页面标题\\n if (to.meta.title) {\\n document.title = `${to.meta.title} - 股票策略分析系统`\\n }\\n next()\\n})\\n\\nexport default router\\n... EOF no more lines ...\\n\", \"fileSize\": \"3.39 KB\", \"isBigFile\": false, \"totalLines\": 162}"}

{"messageId":"019e8235e96b78d69db8ba7c9f6719ea","rawEvent":{"message_id":"019e8235e96b78d69db8ba7c9f6719ea","conversation_id":"019e8235abe37fb686d64a3a06b3af83","content":"问题在于 `src/router/index.js` 引用了不存在的 `StockSearch.vue` 文件。该目录下目前只有 `StockList.vue`。

两个解决方案供你选择：

1. **创建缺失的 `StockSearch.vue` 文件**（如果你需要这个页面）
2. **移除路由中对 `StockSearch.vue` 的引用**（如果你不需要）"},"timestamp":1780301041,"type":"TEXT_MESSAGE_CONTENT"}

{"messageId":"019e8235e96b78d69db8ba7c9f6719ea","rawEvent":{"message_id":"019e8235e96b78d69db8ba7c9f6719ea","conversation_id":"019e8235abe37fb686d64a3a06b3af83","content":"已修复。原因是 `src/router/index.js` 引入了不存在的 `StockSearch.vue` 文件，而 `src/views/stocks/` 目录下只有 `StockList.vue`。\n\n我移除了路由中关于 `StockSearch` 的导入和路由配置，现在 Docker 构建应该能正常通过了。"},"timestamp":1780301055,"type":"TEXT_MESSAGE_CONTENT"}

{"type":"TOOL_CALL_ARGS","timestamp":1780301420,"rawEvent":{"message_id":"019e823bb6587e56926b390890020f2b","conversation_id":"019e8235abe37fb686d64a3a06b3af83","tool_call_id":"functions.read_file:16","document":{"sub_content":"DEVELOPMENT.md","sub_content_event":"open_editor","sub_content_event_value":"E:/myproject/stock-v3/DEVELOPMENT.md","sub_content_tip":"E:/myproject/stock-v3/DEVELOPMENT.md"}},"toolCallId":"functions.read_file:16","delta":"{\"explanation\": \"读取项目开发文档，了解前端页面规划和功能定义\", \"path\": \"E:/myproject/stock-v3/DEVELOPMENT.md\"}"}

{"type":"TOOL_CALL_RESULT","timestamp":1780301420,"rawEvent":{"message_id":"019e823bb6587e56926b390890020f2b","conversation_id":"019e8235abe37fb686d64a3a06b3af83","tool_call_id":"functions.read_file:16","result":{},"display_name":"读取文件"},"messageId":"019e823bb6587e56926b390890020f2b","toolCallId":"functions.read_file:16","content":"{\"content\": \"# 开发指南\\n\\n## 项目概述\\n\\n股票策略分析系统是一个基于微服务架构的企业级应用，包含数据采集、策略计算、Web界面等多个模块。\\n\\n## 开发环境搭建\\n\\n### 1. 环境要求\\n\\n- **操作系统**: Linux/macOS/Windows (推荐Linux)\\n- **Python**: 3.8+ (数据采集模块)\\n- **Node.js**: 16+ (前端界面)\\n- **Go**: 1.19+ (后端服务)\\n- **Docker**: 20.10+ (可选，用于容器化部署)\\n- **PostgreSQL**: 15+ (数据库)\\n- **Redis**: 7+ (缓存)\\n\\n### 2. 快速开始\\n\\n```bash\\n# 克隆项目\\ngit clone \\ncd stock-v3\\n\\n# 一键启动开发环境\\nchmod +x start.sh\\n./start.sh install # 安装依赖\\n./start.sh start # 启动所有服务\\n```\\n\\n### 3. 手动启动（可选）\\n\\n```bash\\n# 1. 启动数据库服务\\ncd deploy\\ndocker-compose up -d postgres redis\\n\\n# 2. 启动数据采集服务\\ncd data/python\\npython3 -m venv venv\\nsource venv/bin/activate\\npip install -r requirements.txt\\npython main.py --schedule\\n\\n# 3. 启动后端服务\\ncd backend\\ngo mod tidy\\ngo run main.go\\n\\n# 4. 启动前端服务\\ncd frontend\\nnpm install\\nnpm run dev\\n```\\n\\n## 项目架构\\n\\n### 1. 数据流架构\\n\\n```\\n数据源 (BaoStock/AKShare)\\n ↓\\n数据采集器 (Python)\\n ↓\\n数据库 (PostgreSQL)\\n ↓\\n策略引擎 (Golang)\\n ↓\\nAPI服务 (Gin)\\n ↓\\n前端界面 (Vue.js)\\n```\\n\\n### 2. 目录结构\\n\\n```\\nstock-v3/\\n├── data/ # 数据采集模块\\n│ ├── python/ # Python脚本\\n│ │ ├── main.py # 主程序\\n│ │ ├── collector.py # 数据采集器\\n│ │ ├── writer.py # 数据库写入器\\n│ │ └── requirements.txt\\n│ └── config/ # 配置管理\\n├── backend/ # Golang后端\\n│ ├── api/ # API接口\\n│ ├── strategy/ # 策略引擎\\n│ ├── model/ # 数据模型\\n│ ├── task/ # 定时任务\\n│ ├── config/ # 配置管理\\n│ ├── go.mod # Go模块\\n│ └── main.go # 主程序\\n├── frontend/ # Vue前端\\n│ ├── src/\\n│ │ ├── views/ # 页面组件\\n│ │ ├── router/ # 路由配置\\n│ │ ├── components/ # 公共组件\\n│ │ └── main.js # 应用入口\\n│ ├── package.json\\n│ └── vite.config.js\\n├── database/ # 数据库脚本\\n├── deploy/ # 部署配置\\n└── docs/ # 项目文档\\n```\\n\\n## 开发规范\\n\\n### 1. 代码规范\\n\\n#### Python代码规范\\n- 遵循PEP8规范\\n- 使用类型注解\\n- 函数和类要有文档字符串\\n- 使用Black进行代码格式化\\n\\n```python\\ndef get_stock_data(stock_code: str, start_date: str, end_date: str) -> pd.DataFrame:\\n \\\"\\\"\\\"\\n 获取股票历史数据\\n \\n Args:\\n stock_code: 股票代码\\n start_date: 开始日期 (YYYY-MM-DD)\\n end_date: 结束日期 (YYYY-MM-DD)\\n \\n Returns:\\n DataFrame: 股票历史数据\\n \\\"\\\"\\\"\\n # 实现代码\\n pass\\n```\\n\\n#### Go代码规范\\n- 遵循Effective Go规范\\n- 使用gofmt进行代码格式化\\n- 错误处理要明确\\n- 包名使用小写字母\\n\\n```go\\n// GetStockList 获取股票列表\\nfunc GetStockList(c *gin.Context) {\\n stocks, err := stockRepo.GetAllStocks()\\n if err != nil {\\n c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, gin.H{\\\"error\\\": \\\"获取股票列表失败\\\"})\\n return\\n }\\n \\n c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{\\\"stocks\\\": stocks})\\n}\\n```\\n\\n#### JavaScript/Vue代码规范\\n- 使用ESLint + Prettier\\n- 遵循Vue官方风格指南\\n- 使用Composition API\\n- 组件名使用PascalCase\\n\\n```vue\\n\\n\\n\\n```\\n\\n### 2. 数据库设计规范\\n\\n#### 表命名规范\\n- 使用小写字母和下划线\\n- 表名使用复数形式\\n- 关联表使用下划线连接\\n\\n```sql\\n-- 股票基本信息表\\nCREATE TABLE stocks (\\n id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,\\n code VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL UNIQUE,\\n name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,\\n industry VARCHAR(100),\\n created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP\\n);\\n\\n-- 股票日线数据表\\nCREATE TABLE stock_daily_data (\\n id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,\\n stock_code VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,\\n trade_date DATE NOT NULL,\\n close_price DECIMAL(10,3),\\n volume BIGINT,\\n UNIQUE(stock_code, trade_date)\\n);\\n```\\n\\n### 3. API设计规范\\n\\n#### RESTful API设计\\n- 使用HTTP状态码\\n- 资源使用复数形式\\n- 版本控制使用URL路径\\n\\n```\\nGET /api/v1/stocks # 获取股票列表\\nGET /api/v1/stocks/{code} # 获取股票详情\\nPOST /api/v1/strategies/run # 执行策略\\nGET /api/v1/fund-flow/sectors # 获取板块资金流\\n```\\n\\n#### 响应格式\\n```json\\n{\\n \\\"success\\\": true,\\n \\\"data\\\": {...},\\n \\\"message\\\": \\\"操作成功\\\",\\n \\\"timestamp\\\": \\\"2026-06-01T00:00:00Z\\\"\\n}\\n```\\n\\n## 模块开发指南\\n\\n### 1. 数据采集模块开发\\n\\n#### 添加新的数据源\\n\\n1. 在`data/python/collector.py`中添加新的数据源类\\n2. 实现数据获取方法\\n3. 在`data/python/main.py`中集成新数据源\\n\\n```python\\nclass NewDataSource:\\n def get_stock_data(self, stock_code, start_date, end_date):\\n # 实现数据获取逻辑\\n pass\\n \\n def get_industry_data(self):\\n # 实现行业数据获取\\n pass\\n```\\n\\n#### 添加新的技术指标\\n\\n1. 在`data/python/indicators.py`中添加指标计算函数\\n2. 在数据采集流程中调用指标计算\\n\\n```python\\ndef calculate_rsi(prices, period=14):\\n \\\"\\\"\\\"计算RSI指标\\\"\\\"\\\"\\n # RSI计算逻辑\\n pass\\n```\\n\\n### 2. 策略模块开发\\n\\n#### 添加新的策略\\n\\n1. 在`backend/strategy/`目录下创建策略文件\\n2. 实现策略接口\\n3. 在策略管理器中注册新策略\\n\\n```go\\n// 创建新策略文件\\n// backend/strategy/new_strategy.go\\n\\ntype NewStrategy struct {\\n name string\\n parameters map[string]interface{}\\n}\\n\\nfunc (s *NewStrategy) Execute(stock *model.Stock, data []model.StockDailyData) *model.StrategyResult {\\n // 策略逻辑实现\\n return &model.StrategyResult{\\n StockCode: stock.Code,\\n Score: 0.8,\\n BuyPrice: 100.0,\\n LogicDescription: \\\"新策略逻辑说明\\\",\\n }\\n}\\n```\\n\\n#### 策略参数配置\\n\\n```go\\n// 在策略管理器中注册新策略\\nfunc NewStrategyManager() *StrategyManager {\\n return &StrategyManager{\\n strategies: map[string]Strategy{\\n \\\"new_strategy\\\": &NewStrategy{\\n name: \\\"新策略\\\",\\n parameters: map[string]interface{}{\\n \\\"param1\\\": 10,\\n \\\"param2\\\": 0.5,\\n },\\n },\\n },\\n }\\n}\\n```\\n\\n### 3. 前端模块开发\\n\\n#### 添加新的页面\\n\\n1. 在`frontend/src/views/`目录下创建新页面组件\\n2. 在路由配置中添加新路由\\n3. 在侧边栏菜单中添加导航项\\n\\n```vue\\n\\n\\n\\n\\n```\\n\\n#### 添加新的图表组件\\n\\n1. 在`frontend/src/components/charts/`目录下创建图表组件\\n2. 使用ECharts进行数据可视化\\n\\n```vue\\n\\n\\n\\n```\\n\\n## 测试指南\\n\\n### 1. 单元测试\\n\\n#### Python单元测试\\n```python\\n# tests/test_collector.py\\nimport unittest\\nfrom data.python.collector import StockDataCollector\\n\\nclass TestStockCollector(unittest.TestCase):\\n def test_get_stock_data(self):\\n collector = StockDataCollector()\\n data = collector.get_stock_data(\\\"000001\\\", \\\"2024-01-01\\\", \\\"2024-01-31\\\")\\n self.assertIsNotNone(data)\\n self.assertGreater(len(data), 0)\\n```\\n\\n#### Go单元测试\\n```go\\n// backend/strategy/strategy_test.go\\npackage strategy\\n\\nimport (\\n \\\"testing\\\"\\n \\\"stock-strategy-backend/model\\\"\\n)\\n\\nfunc TestShortTermStrategy(t *testing.T) {\\n strategy := NewShortTermStrategy(\\\"short_term_1\\\")\\n stock := &model.Stock{Code: \\\"000001\\\", Name: \\\"测试股票\\\"}\\n \\n result := strategy.Execute(stock, []model.StockDailyData{})\\n if result == nil {\\n t.Error(\\\"策略执行失败\\\")\\n }\\n}\\n```\\n\\n### 2. 集成测试\\n\\n```bash\\n# 运行所有测试\\ncd backend && go test ./...\\ncd ../data/python && python -m pytest\\n```\\n\\n## 部署指南\\n\\n### 1. 开发环境部署\\n\\n```bash\\n# 使用Docker Compose部署\\ncd deploy\\ndocker-compose up -d\\n\\n# 验证服务状态\\ndocker-compose ps\\ncurl http://localhost:8080/health\\n```\\n\\n### 2. 生产环境部署\\n\\n```bash\\n# 使用部署脚本\\ncd deploy\\n./deploy.sh --deploy\\n\\n# 配置Nginx反向代理\\nsudo cp nginx/stock-strategy.conf /etc/nginx/sites-available/\\nsudo ln -s /etc/nginx/sites-available/stock-strategy.conf /etc/nginx/sites-enabled/\\nsudo nginx -t\\nsudo systemctl reload nginx\\n```\\n\\n## 性能优化\\n\\n### 1. 数据库优化\\n\\n```sql\\n-- 添加索引\\nCREATE INDEX idx_stock_daily_data_code_date ON stock_daily_data(stock_code, trade_date);\\nCREATE INDEX idx_strategy_results_date_strategy ON strategy_results(trade_date, strategy_id);\\n\\n-- 分区表\\nCREATE TABLE stock_daily_data_2024 PARTITION OF stock_daily_data \\nFOR VALUES FROM ('2024-01-01') TO ('2025-01-01');\\n```\\n\\n### 2. 缓存优化\\n\\n```go\\n// 使用Redis缓存热点数据\\nfunc GetStockWithCache(stockCode string) (*model.Stock, error) {\\n cacheKey := fmt.Sprintf(\\\"stock:%s\\\", stockCode)\\n \\n // 从缓存获取\\n if cached, err := redis.Get(cacheKey); err == nil {\\n return cached, nil\\n }\\n \\n // 从数据库获取\\n stock, err := stockRepo.GetStockByCode(stockCode)\\n if err != nil {\\n return nil, err\\n }\\n \\n // 设置缓存\\n redis.Set(cacheKey, stock, 30*time.Minute)\\n \\n return stock, nil\\n}\\n```\\n\\n### 3. 前端性能优化\\n\\n```javascript\\n// 使用虚拟滚动优化大数据列表\\nimport { ElTableV2 } from 'element-plus'\\n\\nconst columns = [\\n { key: 'code', title: '代码', width: 100 },\\n { key: 'name', title: '名称', width: 120 },\\n // ...更多列\\n]\\n\\n\\n```\\n\\n## 故障排除\\n\\n### 常见问题\\n\\n#### 1. 数据库连接失败\\n```bash\\n# 检查数据库服务状态\\nsudo systemctl status postgresql\\n\\n# 检查连接配置\\ncat backend/config.yaml | grep database\\n```\\n\\n#### 2. 数据采集失败\\n```bash\\n# 检查数据源API状态\\ncurl https://api.baostock.com/health\\n\\n# 查看采集日志\\ntail -f data/python/collector.log\\n```\\n\\n#### 3. 前端构建失败\\n```bash\\n# 清理缓存\\nrm -rf frontend/node_modules frontend/package-lock.json\\nnpm install\\nnpm run build\\n```\\n\\n## 贡献指南\\n\\n### 1. 代码提交规范\\n\\n- 使用约定式提交格式\\n- 提交信息使用英文\\n- 一个提交对应一个功能或修复\\n\\n```bash\\ngit commit -m \\\"feat: 添加新的短线策略\\\"\\ngit commit -m \\\"fix: 修复数据采集内存泄漏\\\"\\ngit commit -m \\\"docs: 更新API文档\\\"\\n```\\n\\n### 2. Pull Request流程\\n\\n1. Fork项目仓库\\n2. 创建功能分支\\n3. 提交代码变更\\n4. 创建Pull Request\\n5. 等待代码审查\\n6. 合并到主分支\\n\\n## 联系方式\\n\\n- 项目维护者: v_zwhozhang\\n- 问题反馈: GitHub Issues\\n- 文档更新: 提交Pull Request\\n\\n---\\n\\n**最后更新**: 2026年6月1日 \\n**版本**: v1.0.0\\n... EOF no more lines ...\\n\", \"fileSize\": \"11.43 KB\", \"isBigFile\": false, \"totalLines\": 552}"}

\"import { createRouter, createWebHistory } from 'vue-router'\\n\\n// 导入页面组件\\nimport Dashboard from '../views/Dashboard.vue'\\nimport StockList from '../views/stocks/StockList.vue'\\nimport Industries from '../views/stocks/Industries.vue'\\nimport ShortTermStrategy from '../views/strategies/ShortTermStrategy.vue'\\nimport MediumTermStrategy from '../views/strategies/MediumTermStrategy.vue'\\nimport LongTermStrategy from '../views/strategies/LongTermStrategy.vue'\\nimport StrategyHistory from '../views/strategies/StrategyHistory.vue'\\nimport SectorFundFlow from '../views/fund-flow/SectorFundFlow.vue'\\nimport FundFlowTrend from '../views/fund-flow/FundFlowTrend.vue'\\nimport FundFlowSummary from '../views/fund-flow/FundFlowSummary.vue'\\nimport Settings from '../views/Settings.vue'\\n\\nconst routes = [\\n {\\n path: '/',\\n redirect: '/dashboard'\\n },\\n {\\n path: '/dashboard',\\n name: 'Dashboard',\\n component: Dashboard,\\n meta: {\\n title: '仪表盘',\\n icon: 'House'\\n }\\n },\\n // 股票管理路由\\n {\\n path: '/stocks',\\n redirect: '/stocks/list'\\n },\\n {\\n path: '/stocks/list',\\n name: 'StockList',\\n component: StockList,\\n meta: {\\n title: '股票列表',\\n icon: 'List'\\n }\\n },\\n {\\n path: '/stocks/industries',\\n name: 'Industries',\\n component: Industries,\\n meta: {\\n 'Clock'\\n }\\n },\\n {\\n path: '/strategies/history',\\n name: 'StrategyHistory',\\n component: StrategyHistory,\\n meta: {\\n title: '策略历史',\\n icon: 'Document'\\n }\\n },\\n // 资金流向路由\\n {\\n 'Settings',\\n component: Settings,\\n meta: {\\n title: '系统设置',\\n icon: 'Setting'\\n }\\n }\\n]\\n\\nconst router = createRouter({\\n history: createWebHistory(),\\n routes\\n})\\n\\n// {"messageId":"019e823bb6587e56926b390890020f2b","rawEvent":{"message_id":"019e823bb6587e56926b390890020f2b","conversation_id":"019e8235abe37fb686d64a3a06b3af83","content":"根据项目路由配置，这些缺失页面的功能定义如下：

| 页面 | 路径 | 功能描述 |
|------|------|----------|
| `Industries.vue` | `/stocks/industries` | **行业分类** — 展示股票市场各行业分类信息 |
| `MediumTermStrategy.vue` | `/strategies/medium-term` | **中线策略** — 中线投资策略分析页面 |
| `LongTermStrategy.vue` | `/strategies/long-term` | **长线策略** — 长线投资策略分析页面 |
| `StrategyHistory.vue` | `/strategies/history` | **策略历史** — 查看历史策略执行记录和结果 |
| `SectorFundFlow.vue` | `/fund-flow/sectors` | **板块资金流** — 各行业板块的资金流入/流出分析 |
| `FundFlowTrend.vue` | `/fund-flow/trend` | **资金流趋势** — 资金流向的趋势图表展示 |
| `FundFlowSummary.vue` | `/fund-flow/summary` | **资金流摘要** — 资金流向的汇总数据概览 |
| `Settings.vue` | `/settings` | **系统设置** — 系统参数配置页面 |

整体来看，这覆盖了三大功能模块：

1. **股票管理**：已实现的 `StockList`（股票列表）+ 缺失的 `Industries`（行业分类）
2. **策略分析**：已实现的 `ShortTermStrategy`（短线策略）+ 缺失的 `MediumTermStrategy`、`LongTermStrategy`、`StrategyHistory`
3. **资金流向**：整个模块（板块资金流、趋势、摘要）都缺失
4. **系统设置**：`Settings` 缺失

已知后端已有 `short_term_strategy.go` 和 `medium_term_strategy.go`，说明后端策略引擎已有实现。前端这些页面应该是规划好但尚未开发。

你需要我现在帮你创建这些缺失的空白页面让项目能正常构建吗？"},"timestamp":1780301424,"type":"TEXT_MESSAGE_CONTENT"}

option.name: question
option.value: 这些页面是什么功能的

{"messageId":"019e824e457e7d37a5be3ef105496cef","rawEvent":{"message_id":"019e824e457e7d37a5be3ef105496cef","conversation_id":"019e8235abe37fb686d64a3a06b3af83","content":"所有页面文件已创建完毕！现在可以构建 Docker 镜像了。

让我为您总结一下已创建的 8 个新页面：

| 页面 | 路径 | 功能 |
|---|---|---|
| **行业分类** | `views/stocks/Industries.vue` | 行业列表、行业统计、头部股票、图表分布 |
| **中线策略** | `views/strategies/MediumTermStrategy.vue` | 低估值修复、业绩持续增长、行业景气回升策略 |
| **长线策略** | `views/strategies/LongTermStrategy.vue` | 高股息价值、护城河龙头、成长确定性策略 |
| **策略历史** | `views/strategies/StrategyHistory.vue` | 历史执行记录、筛选、收益率曲线图 |
| **板块资金流向** | `views/fund-flow/SectorFundFlow.vue` | 板块净流入/流出排行、个股明细、图表 |
| **资金流趋势** | `views/fund-flow/FundFlowTrend.vue` | 主力/散户/净流入多维度趋势图表 |
| **资金流摘要** | `views/fund-flow/FundFlowSummary.vue` | 整体概览、饼图分布、板块汇总表 |
| **系统设置** | `views/Settings.vue` | 基本/通知/数据采集/API 配置、系统信息 |

每个页面都采用了统一的风格：Element Plus UI 组件 + ECharts 图表 + 模拟数据，与现有的 `Dashboard.vue`、`StockList.vue`、`ShortTermStrategy.vue` 保持一致。

现在可以尝试重新构建 Docker 镜像了：

```powershell
cd E:\myproject\stock-v3
docker-compose build frontend
```"},"timestamp":1780302641,"type":"TEXT_MESSAGE_CONTENT"}

{"type":"TOOL_CALL_RESULT","timestamp":1780300178,"rawEvent":{"message_id":"019e82273aa37a55a0ef706789498058","conversation_id":"019e8226884b727398e12a43cec80339","tool_call_id":"call_78e86e0b5f9047809f01599d","result":{},"display_name":"读取文件"},"messageId":"019e82273aa37a55a0ef706789498058","toolCallId":"call_78e86e0b5f9047809f01599d","content":"{\"content\": \"package strategy\\n\\nimport (\\n\\t\\\"fmt\\\"\\n\\t\\\"math\\\"\\n\\t\\\"time\\\"\\n\\n\\t\\\"stock-strategy-backend/model\\\"\\n)\\n\\n// MediumTermStrategy 中线策略引擎\\ntype MediumTermStrategy struct {\\n\\tname string\\n\\tdescription string\\n\\tparameters map[string]interface{}\\n}\\n\\n// NewMediumTermStrategy 创建中线策略实例\\nfunc NewMediumTermStrategy(strategyID string) *MediumTermStrategy {\\n\\tstrategies := map[string]*MediumTermStrategy{\\n\\t\\t\\\"medium_term_1\\\": {\\n\\t\\t\\tname: \\\"行业成长均线多头\\\",\\n\\t\\t\\tdescription: \\\"行业景气股，偏中长线主做，近两季营收/净利同比↑，ROE≥10%，股价站上60日线，5>10>20>60\\\",\\n\\t\\t\\tparameters: map[string]interface{}{\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\\"roe_threshold\\\": 10.0,\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\\"growth_threshold\\\": 0.1, // 10%增长\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\\"ma_sequence\\\": []int{5, 10, 20, 60},\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\\"platform_breakout_ratio\\\": 0.05, // 平台突破5%\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\\"pullback_ratio\\\": 0.03, // 回踩3%\\n\\t\\t\\t},\\n\\t\\t},\\n\\t\\t\\\"medium_term_2\\\": {\\n\\t\\t\\tname: \\\"困境反转业绩拐点\\\",\\n\\t\\t\\tdescription: \\\"业绩由差转好、订单/政策催化，前期调整>30%，近期季报营收/净利拐点向上，行业有利好\\\",\\n\\t\\t\\tparameters: map[string]interface{}{\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\\"decline_threshold\\\": 0.3, // 前期调整30%\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\\"recovery_period\\\": 2, // 恢复期2个季度\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\\"turnaround_growth\\\": 0.15, // 拐点增长15%\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\\"volume_increase_ratio\\\": 1.5, // 成交量放大1.5倍\\n\\t\\t\\t},\\n\\t\\t},\\n\\t\\t\\\"medium_term_3\\\": {\\n\\t\\t\\tname: \\\"高股息红利慢牛\\\",\\n\\t\\t\\tdescription: \\\"震荡市/偏弱市，求稳健，银行/电力/高速/运营商/部分资源股，股息率≥4%~5%，ROE稳定\\\",\\n\\t\\t\\tparameters: map[string]interface{}{\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\\"dividend_yield\\\": 4.5,\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\\"roe_stability\\\": 5, // 连续5年ROE稳定\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\\"debt_ratio\\\": 0.6, // 负债率不超过60%\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\\"volatility_threshold\\\": 0.3, // 年波动率不超过30%\\n\\t\\t\\t},\\n\\t\\t},\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\tif strategy, exists := strategies[strategyID]; exists {\\n\\t\\treturn strategy\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\treturn &MediumTermStrategy{\\n\\t\\tname: \\\"未知中线策略\\\",\\n\\t\\tdescription: \\\"策略配置不存在\\\",\\n\\t\\tparameters: make(map[string]interface{}),\\n\\t}\\n}\\n\\n// Execute 执行中线策略\\nfunc (s *MediumTermStrategy) Execute(stock *model.Stock, dailyData []model.StockDailyData, financialData *model.FinancialData, indicators []model.TechnicalIndicator) *model.StrategyResult {\\n\\tif len(dailyData) < 120 { // 至少需要4个月数据\\n\\t\\treturn nil\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\tvar result *model.StrategyResult\\n\\n\\tswitch s.name {\\n\\tcase \\\"行业成长均线多头\\\":\\n\\t\\tresult = s.executeIndustryGrowthStrategy(stock, dailyData, financialData, indicators)\\n\\tcase \\\"困境反转业绩拐点\\\":\\n\\t\\tresult = s.executeTurnaroundStrategy(stock, dailyData, financialData, indicators)\\n\\tcase \\\"高股息红利慢牛\\\":\\n\\t\\tresult = s.executeDividendStrategy(stock, dailyData, financialData, indicators)\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\treturn result\\n}\\n\\n// executeIndustryGrowthStrategy 行业成长均线多头策略\\nfunc (s *MediumTermStrategy) executeIndustryGrowthStrategy(stock *model.Stock, dailyData []model.StockDailyData, financialData *model.FinancialData, indicators []model.TechnicalIndicator) *model.StrategyResult {\\n\\tlatestData := dailyData[len(dailyData)-1]\\n\\n\\t// 1. 检查基本面条件\\n\\tif !s.checkFinancialConditions(financialData) {\\n\\t\\treturn nil\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\t// 2. 检查均线多头排列\\n\\tmaSequence := s.parameters[\\\"ma_sequence\\\"].([]int)\\n\\tif !s.checkMASequence(dailyData, maSequence) {\\n\\t\\treturn nil\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\t// 3. 检查平台突破\\n\\tplatformBreakoutRatio := s.parameters[\\\"platform_breakout_ratio\\\"].(float64)\\n\\tbreakoutOK := s.checkPlatformBreakout(dailyData, platformBreakoutRatio)\\n\\tif !breakoutOK {\\n\\t\\treturn nil\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\t// 4. 检查回踩支撑\\n\\tpullbackRatio := s.parameters[\\\"pullback_ratio\\\"].(float64)\\n\\tsupportOK := s.checkSupportLevel(dailyData, pullbackRatio)\\n\\tif !supportOK {\\n\\t\\treturn nil\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\t// 5. 计算评分\\n\\tscore := s.calculateIndustryGrowthScore(latestData, dailyData, financialData, indicators)\\n\\n\\tif score < 0.6 {\\n\\t\\treturn nil\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\t// 6. 生成买卖点建议\\n\\tbuyPrice := latestData.ClosePrice\\n\\tstopLoss := s.calculateStopLossPrice(dailyData, maSequence)\\n\\ttakeProfit := buyPrice * 1.15 // +15%止盈\\n\\n\\tlogic := fmt.Sprintf(\\\"行业景气股，基本面良好，均线多头排列，平台突破后回踩支撑企稳\\\")\\n\\n\\treturn &model.StrategyResult{\\n\\t\\tStockCode: stock.Code,\\n\\t\\tScore: score,\\n\\t\\tBuyPrice: buyPrice,\\n\\t\\tStopLossPrice: stopLoss,\\n\\t\\tTakeProfitPrice: takeProfit,\\n\\t\\tLogicDescription: logic,\\n\\t}\\n}\\n\\n// executeTurnaroundStrategy 困境反转业绩拐点策略\\nfunc (s *MediumTermStrategy) executeTurnaroundStrategy(stock *model.Stock, dailyData []model.StockDailyData, financialData *model.FinancialData, indicators []model.TechnicalIndicator) *model.StrategyResult {\\n\\tlatestData := dailyData[len(dailyData)-1]\\n\\n\\t// 1. 检查前期调整幅度\\n\\tdeclineThreshold := s.parameters[\\\"decline_threshold\\\"].(float64)\\n\\tif !s.checkPreviousDecline(dailyData, declineThreshold) {\\n\\t\\treturn nil\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\t// 2. 检查业绩拐点\\n\\trecoveryPeriod := s.parameters[\\\"recovery_period\\\"].(int)\\n\\tturnaroundGrowth := s.parameters[\\\"turnaround_growth\\\"].(float64)\\n\\tif !s.checkPerformanceTurnaround(financialData, recoveryPeriod, turnaroundGrowth) {\\n\\t\\treturn nil\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\t// 3. 检查技术面突破\\n\\tvolumeIncreaseRatio := s.parameters[\\\"volume_increase_ratio\\\"].(float64)\\n\\tif !s.checkTechnicalBreakout(dailyData, volumeIncreaseRatio) {\\n\\t\\treturn nil\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\t// 4. 检查行业利好\\n\\tif !s.checkIndustryCatalyst(stock.Industry) {\\n\\t\\treturn nil\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\t// 5. 计算评分\\n\\tscore := s.calculateTurnaroundScore(latestData, dailyData, financialData, indicators)\\n\\n\\tif score < 0.6 {\\n\\t\\treturn nil\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\t// 6. 生成买卖点建议\\n\\tbuyPrice := latestData.ClosePrice\\n\\tstopLoss := latestData.ClosePrice * 0.88 // -12%止损\\n\\ttakeProfit := buyPrice * 1.25 // +25%止盈（困境反转空间较大）\\n\\n\\tlogic := fmt.Sprintf(\\\"业绩拐点确认，前期充分调整，技术面突破，行业有利好催化\\\")\\n\\n\\treturn &model.StrategyResult{\\n\\t\\tStockCode: stock.Code,\\n\\t\\tScore: score,\\n\\t\\tBuyPrice: buyPrice,\\n\\t\\tStopLossPrice: stopLoss,\\n\\t\\tTakeProfitPrice: takeProfit,\\n\\t\\tLogicDescription: logic,\\n\\t}\\n}\\n\\n// executeDividendStrategy 高股息红利慢牛策略\\nfunc (s *MediumTermStrategy) executeDividendStrategy(stock *model.Stock, dailyData []model.StockDailyData, financialData *model.FinancialData, indicators []model.TechnicalIndicator) *model.StrategyResult {\\n\\tlatestData := dailyData[len(dailyData)-1]\\n\\n\\t// 1. 检查股息率\\n\\tdividendYield := s.parameters[\\\"dividend_yield\\\"].(float64)\\n\\tif !s.checkDividendYield(financialData, dividendYield) {\\n\\t\\treturn nil\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\t// 2. 检查ROE稳定性\\n\\troeStability := s.parameters[\\\"roe_stability\\\"].(int)\\n\\tif !s.checkROEStability(financialData, roeStability) {\\n\\t\\treturn nil\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\t// 3. 检查负债率\\n\\tdebtRatio := s.parameters[\\\"debt_ratio\\\"].(float64)\\n\\tif !s.checkDebtRatio(financialData, debtRatio) {\\n\\t\\treturn nil\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\t// 4. 检查波动率\\n\\tvolatilityThreshold := s.parameters[\\\"volatility_threshold\\\"].(float64)\\n\\tif !s.checkVolatility(dailyData, volatilityThreshold) {\\n\\t\\treturn nil\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\t// 5. 检查技术面趋势\\n\\tif !s.checkSlowBullTrend(dailyData) {\\n\\t\\treturn nil\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\t// 6. 计算评分\\n\\tscore := s.calculateDividendScore(latestData, dailyData, financialData, indicators)\\n\\n\\tif score < 0.6 {\\n\\t\\treturn nil\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\t// 7. 生成买卖点建议\\n\\tbuyPrice := latestData.ClosePrice\\n\\tstopLoss := latestData.ClosePrice * 0.85 // -15%止损（慢牛策略止损较宽）\\n\\ttakeProfit := buyPrice * 1.20 // +20%止盈\\n\\n\\tlogic := fmt.Sprintf(\\\"高股息率，ROE稳定，负债合理，慢牛趋势确立\\\")\\n\\n\\treturn &model.StrategyResult{\\n\\t\\tStockCode: stock.Code,\\n\\t\\tScore: score,\\n\\t\\tBuyPrice: buyPrice,\\n\\t\\tStopLossPrice: stopLoss,\\n\\t\\tTakeProfitPrice: takeProfit,\\n\\t\\tLogicDescription: logic,\\n\\t}\\n}\\n\\n// checkFinancialConditions 检查基本面条件\\nfunc (s *MediumTermStrategy) checkFinancialConditions(financialData *model.FinancialData) bool {\\n\\tif financialData == nil {\\n\\t\\treturn false\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\t// 检查ROE\\n\\troeThreshold := s.parameters[\\\"roe_threshold\\\"].(float64)\\n\\tif financialData.ROE < roeThreshold {\\n\\t\\treturn false\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\t// 检查增长性\\n\\tgrowthThreshold := s.parameters[\\\"growth_threshold\\\"].(float64)\\n\\tif financialData.RevenueGrowth < growthThreshold || financialData.ProfitGrowth < growthThreshold {\\n\\t\\treturn false\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\treturn true\\n}\\n\\n// checkMASequence 检查均线多头排列\\nfunc (s *MediumTermStrategy) checkMASequence(dailyData []model.StockDailyData, maSequence []int) bool {\\n\\tif len(dailyData) < maSequence[len(maSequence)-1] {\\n\\t\\treturn false\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\t// 计算各周期均线\\n\\tmaValues := make([]float64, len(maSequence))\\n\\tfor i, period := range maSequence {\\n\\t\\tmaValues[i] = s.calculateMA(dailyData, period)\\n\\t\\tif maValues[i] == 0 {\\n\\t\\t\\treturn false\\n\\t\\t}\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\t// 检查是否多头排列（短周期>长周期）\\n\\tfor i := 1; i < len(maValues); i++ {\\n\\t\\tif maValues[i-1] <= maValues[i] {\\n\\t\\t\\treturn false\\n\\t\\t}\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\treturn true\\n}\\n\\n// checkPlatformBreakout 检查平台突破\\nfunc (s *MediumTermStrategy) checkPlatformBreakout(dailyData []model.StockDailyData, breakoutRatio float64) bool {\\n\\tif len(dailyData) < 60 {\\n\\t\\treturn false\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\t// 寻找平台区间（最近20-40个交易日）\\n\\tplatformStart := len(dailyData) - 40\\n\\tplatformEnd := len(dailyData) - 20\\n\\tplatformData := dailyData[platformStart:platformEnd]\\n\\n\\t// 计算平台高低点\\n\\tplatformHigh, platformLow := s.findPlatformRange(platformData)\\n\\n\\t// 检查是否突破平台\\n\\tlatestData := dailyData[len(dailyData)-1]\\n\\tbreakoutLevel := platformHigh * (1 + breakoutRatio)\\n\\n\\treturn latestData.ClosePrice >= breakoutLevel\\n}\\n\\n// checkSupportLevel 检查回踩支撑\\nfunc (s *MediumTermStrategy) checkSupportLevel(dailyData []model.StockDailyData, pullbackRatio float64) bool {\\n\\tlatestData := dailyData[len(dailyData)-1]\\n\\n\\t// 计算关键均线支撑\\n\\tma20 := s.calculateMA(dailyData, 20)\\n\\tma60 := s.calculateMA(dailyData, 60)\\n\\n\\tif ma20 == 0 || ma60 == 0 {\\n\\t\\treturn false\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\t// 检查是否回踩均线\\n\\tsupportLevel := math.Max(ma20, ma60)\\n\\tpullbackDistance := math.Abs(latestData.ClosePrice-supportLevel) / supportLevel\\n\\n\\treturn pullbackDistance <= pullbackRatio\\n}\\n\\n// checkPreviousDecline 检查前期调整幅度\\nfunc (s *MediumTermStrategy) checkPreviousDecline(dailyData []model.StockDailyData, declineThreshold float64) bool {\\n\\tif len(dailyData) < 120 {\\n\\t\\treturn false\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\t// 寻找前期高点（6个月前）\\n\\thighPoint := len(dailyData) - 120\\n\\thighPrice := dailyData[highPoint].HighPrice\\n\\n\\t// 寻找近期低点（1个月前）\\n\\tlowPoint := len(dailyData) - 20\\n\\tlowPrice := dailyData[lowPoint].LowPrice\\n\\n\\tif highPrice == 0 {\\n\\t\\treturn false\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\tdeclineRatio := (highPrice - lowPrice) / highPrice\\n\\treturn declineRatio >= declineThreshold\\n}\\n\\n// checkPerformanceTurnaround 检查业绩拐点\\nfunc (s *MediumTermStrategy) checkPerformanceTurnaround(financialData *model.FinancialData, recoveryPeriod int, turnaroundGrowth float64) bool {\\n\\tif financialData == nil {\\n\\t\\treturn false\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\t// 检查最近几个季度的业绩变化\\n\\t// 这里需要具体的财务数据实现\\n\\t// 简化实现：检查最近季度是否增长\\n\\treturn financialData.LastQuarterGrowth >= turnaroundGrowth\\n}\\n\\n// checkTechnicalBreakout 检查技术面突破\\nfunc (s *MediumTermStrategy) checkTechnicalBreakout(dailyData []model.StockDailyData, volumeIncreaseRatio float64) bool {\\n\\tif len(dailyData) < 30 {\\n\\t\\treturn false\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\t// 检查成交量放大\\n\\trecentVolume := dailyData[len(dailyData)-1].Volume\\n\\taverageVolume := s.calculateAverageVolume(dailyData, 30)\\n\\n\\tif averageVolume == 0 {\\n\\t\\treturn false\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\treturn float64(recentVolume) >= float64(averageVolume)*volumeIncreaseRatio\\n}\\n\\n// checkIndustryCatalyst 检查行业利好\\nfunc (s *MediumTermStrategy) checkIndustryCatalyst(industry string) bool {\\n\\t// 这里需要集成行业利好数据\\n\\t// 简化实现：返回true\\n\\treturn true\\n}\\n\\n// checkDividendYield 检查股息率\\nfunc (s *MediumTermStrategy) checkDividendYield(financialData *model.FinancialData, dividendYield float64) bool {\\n\\tif financialData == nil {\\n\\t\\treturn false\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\treturn financialData.DividendYield >= dividendYield\\n}\\n\\n// checkROEStability 检查ROE稳定性\\nfunc (s *MediumTermStrategy) checkROEStability(financialData *model.FinancialData, stabilityYears int) bool {\\n\\tif financialData == nil {\\n\\t\\treturn false\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\t// 检查连续几年的ROE稳定性\\n\\t// 简化实现：检查最近一年的ROE\\n\\treturn financialData.ROE >= 8.0 // 简化标准\\n}\\n\\n// checkDebtRatio 检查负债率\\nfunc (s *MediumTermStrategy) checkDebtRatio(financialData *model.FinancialData, debtRatio float64) bool {\\n\\tif financialData == nil {\\n\\t\\treturn false\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\treturn financialData.DebtRatio <= debtRatio\\n}\\n\\n// checkVolatility 检查波动率\\nfunc (s *MediumTermStrategy) checkVolatility(dailyData []model.StockDailyData, volatilityThreshold float64) bool {\\n\\tif len(dailyData) < 250 {\\n\\t\\treturn false\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\t// 计算年化波动率\\n\\treturns := make([]float64, len(dailyData)-1)\\n\\tfor i := 1; i < len(dailyData); i++ {\\n\\t\\tif dailyData[i-1].ClosePrice > 0 {\\n\\t\\t\\treturns[i-1] = (dailyData[i].ClosePrice - dailyData[i-1].ClosePrice) / dailyData[i-1].ClosePrice\\n\\t\\t}\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\tvolatility := s.calculateVolatility(returns)\\n\\treturn volatility <= volatilityThreshold\\n}\\n\\n// checkSlowBullTrend 检查慢牛趋势\\nfunc (s *MediumTermStrategy) checkSlowBullTrend(dailyData []model.StockDailyData) bool {\\n\\tif len(dailyData) < 120 {\\n\\t\\treturn false\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\t// 检查年线趋势向上\\n\\tma250 := s.calculateMA(dailyData, 250)\\n\\tma120 := s.calculateMA(dailyData, 120)\\n\\n\\tif ma250 == 0 || ma120 == 0 {\\n\\t\\treturn false\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\treturn ma120 > ma250\\n}\\n\\n// calculateMA 计算移动平均线\\nfunc (s *MediumTermStrategy) calculateMA(dailyData []model.StockDailyData, period int) float64 {\\n\\tif len(dailyData) < period {\\n\\t\\treturn 0\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\tvar sum float64\\n\\tfor i := len(dailyData) - period; i < len(dailyData); i++ {\\n\\t\\tsum += dailyData[i].ClosePrice\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\treturn sum / float64(period)\\n}\\n\\n// findPlatformRange 寻找平台范围\\nfunc (s *MediumTermStrategy) findPlatformRange(dailyData []model.StockDailyData) (float64, float64) {\\n\\tif len(dailyData) == 0 {\\n\\t\\treturn 0, 0\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\thigh := dailyData[0].HighPrice\\n\\tlow := dailyData[0].LowPrice\\n\\n\\tfor _, data := range dailyData {\\n\\t\\tif data.HighPrice > high {\\n\\t\\t\\thigh = data.HighPrice\\n\\t\\t}\\n\\t\\tif data.LowPrice < low {\\n\\t\\t\\tlow = data.LowPrice\\n\\t\\t}\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\treturn high, low\\n}\\n\\n// calculateAverageVolume 计算平均成交量\\nfunc (s *MediumTermStrategy) calculateAverageVolume(dailyData []model.StockDailyData, period int) int64 {\\n\\tif len(dailyData) < period {\\n\\t\\treturn 0\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\tvar sum int64\\n\\tfor i := len(dailyData) - period; i < len(dailyData); i++ {\\n\\t\\tsum += dailyData[i].Volume\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\treturn sum / int64(period)\\n}\\n\\n// calculateVolatility 计算波动率\\nfunc (s *MediumTermStrategy) calculateVolatility(returns []float64) float64 {\\n\\tif len(returns) == 0 {\\n\\t\\treturn 0\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\tvar sum float64\\n\\tfor _, r := range returns {\\n\\t\\tsum += r\\n\\t}\\n\\tmean := sum / float64(len(returns))\\n\\n\\tvar variance float64\\n\\tfor _, r := range returns {\\n\\t\\tvariance += math.Pow(r-mean, 2)\\n\\t}\\n\\tvariance /= float64(len(returns))\\n\\n\\treturn math.Sqrt(variance * 252) // 年化波动率\\n}\\n\\n// calculateStopLossPrice 计算止损价格\\nfunc (s *MediumTermStrategy) calculateStopLossPrice(dailyData []model.StockDailyData, maSequence []int) float64 {\\n\\t// 使用最长的均线作为止损位\\n\\tlongestMA := s.calculateMA(dailyData, maSequence[len(maSequence)-1])\\n\\treturn longestMA * 0.95 // 跌破5%止损\\n}\\n\\n// calculateIndustryGrowthScore 计算行业成长策略评分\\nfunc (s *MediumTermStrategy) calculateIndustryGrowthScore(data model.StockDailyData, dailyData []model.StockDailyData, financialData *model.FinancialData, indicators []model.TechnicalIndicator) float64 {\\n\\tscore := 0.5\\n\\n\\t// 基本面评分\\n\\tif financialData != nil {\\n\\t\\tif financialData.ROE >= 15 {\\n\\t\\t\\tscore += 0.15\\n\\t\\t} else if financialData.ROE >= 10 {\\n\\t\\t\\tscore += 0.1\\n\\t\\t}\\n\\n\\t\\tif financialData.RevenueGrowth >= 0.2 {\\n\\t\\t\\tscore += 0.1\\n\\t\\t} else if financialData.RevenueGrowth >= 0.1 {\\n\\t\\t\\tscore += 0.05\\n\\t\\t}\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\t// 技术面评分\\n\\tif s.checkMASequence(dailyData, []int{5, 10, 20, 60}) {\\n\\t\\tscore += 0.15\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\t// 成交量评分\\n\\tif data.Volume > s.calculateAverageVolume(dailyData, 20) {\\n\\t\\tscore += 0.05\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\treturn math.Min(score, 1.0)\\n}\\n\\n// calculateTurnaroundScore 计算困境反转策略评分\\nfunc (s *MediumTermStrategy) calculateTurnaroundScore(data model.StockDailyData, dailyData []model.StockDailyData, financialData *model.FinancialData, indicators []model.TechnicalIndicator) float64 {\\n\\tscore := 0.5\\n\\n\\t// 调整幅度评分\\n\\tif s.checkPreviousDecline(dailyData, 0.3) {\\n\\t\\tscore += 0.15\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\t// 业绩拐点评分\\n\\tif financialData != nil && financialData.LastQuarterGrowth >= 0.15 {\\n\\t\\tscore += 0.2\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\t// 技术突破评分\\n\\tvolumeIncreaseRatio := s.parameters[\\\"volume_increase_ratio\\\"].(float64)\\n\\tif s.checkTechnicalBreakout(dailyData, volumeIncreaseRatio) {\\n\\t\\tscore += 0.1\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\treturn math.Min(score, 1.0)\\n}\\n\\n// calculateDividendScore 计算高股息策略评分\\nfunc (s *MediumTermStrategy) calculateDividendScore(data model.StockDailyData, dailyData []model.StockDailyData, financialData *model.FinancialData, indicators []model.TechnicalIndicator) float64 {\\n\\tscore := 0.5\\n\\n\\t// 股息率评分\\n\\tif financialData != nil {\\n\\t\\tif financialData.DividendYield >= 6 {\\n\\t\\t\\tscore += 0.2\\n\\t\\t} else if financialData.DividendYield >= 4.5 {\\n\\t\\t\\tscore += 0.15\\n\\t\\t}\\n\\n\\t\\t// ROE稳定性评分\\n\\t\\tif financialData.ROE >= 12 {\\n\\t\\t\\tscore += 0.1\\n\\t\\t} else if financialData.ROE >= 8 {\\n\\t\\t\\tscore += 0.05\\n\\t\\t}\\n\\n\\t\\t// 负债率评分\\n\\t\\tif financialData.DebtRatio <= 0.5 {\\n\\t\\t\\tscore += 0.1\\n\\t\\t}\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\t// 波动率评分\\n\\tif s.checkVolatility(dailyData, 0.3) {\\n\\t\\tscore += 0.05\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\treturn math.Min(score, 1.0)\\n}\\n\\n// GetName 获取策略名称\\nfunc (s *MediumTermStrategy) GetName() string {\\n\\treturn s.name\\n}\\n\\n// GetDescription 获取策略描述\\nfunc (s *MediumTermStrategy) GetDescription() string {\\n\\treturn s.description\\n}\\n\\n// GetParameters 获取策略参数\\nfunc (s *MediumTermStrategy) GetParameters() map[string]interface{} {\\n\\treturn s.parameters\\n}\\n... \"package strategy\\n\\nimport (\\n\\t\\\"fmt\\\"\\n\\t\\\"log\\\"\\n\\t\\\"math\\\"\\n\\t\\\"time\\\"\\n\\n\\t\\\"stock-strategy-backend/model\\\"\\n)\\n\\n// ShortTermStrategy 短线策略引擎\\ntype ShortTermStrategy struct {\\n\\tname string\\n\\tdescription string\\n\\tparameters map[string]interface{}\\n}\\n\\n// NewShortTermStrategy 创建短线策略实例\\nfunc NewShortTermStrategy(strategyID string) *ShortTermStrategy {\\n\\tstrategies := map[string]*ShortTermStrategy{\\n\\t\\t\\\"short_term_1\\\": {\\n\\t\\t\\tname: \\\"均线回踩低吸\\\",\\n\\t\\t\\tdescription: \\\"趋势热点股、板块处上升期，股价在20日线上，20日线向上，回踩5/10日线企稳\\\",\\n\\t\\t\\tparameters: map[string]interface{}{\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\\"ma_periods\\\": []int{5, 10, 20},\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\\"volume_ratio\\\": 1.2,\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\\"min_turnover\\\": 500000000.0, // 5亿成交额\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\\"max_price_ratio\\\": 0.03, // 回踩幅度不超过3%\\n\\t\\t\\t},\\n\\t\\t},\\n\\t\\t\\\"short_term_2\\\": {\\n\\t\\t\\tname: \\\"突破缩量回踩\\\",\\n\\t\\t\\tdescription: \\\"横盘震荡后选择方向的票，曾放量突破箱体/前高，回踩原压力转支撑缩量\\\",\\n\\t\\t\\tparameters: map[string]interface{}{\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\\"box_period\\\": 20,\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\\"breakout_volume_ratio\\\": 1.5,\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\\"pullback_volume_ratio\\\": 0.7,\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\\"support_level_ratio\\\": 0.02,\\n\\t\\t\\t},\\n\\t\\t},\\n\\t\\t\\\"short_term_3\\\": {\\n\\t\\t\\tname: \\\"强势股10日线反抽\\\",\\n\\t\\t\\tdescription: \\\"强于大盘的板块龙头，短期回调，第一次回踩10/20日线收阳\\\",\\n\\t\\t\\tparameters: map[string]interface{}{\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\\"compare_period\\\": 20,\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\\"support_ma\\\": 10,\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\\"min_outperform\\\": 0.05, // 强于大盘5%\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\\"max_pullback_ratio\\\": 0.08, // 回调不超过8%\\n\\t\\t\\t},\\n\\t\\t},\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\tif strategy, exists := strategies[strategyID]; exists {\\n\\t\\treturn strategy\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\treturn &ShortTermStrategy{\\n\\t\\tname: \\\"未知短线策略\\\",\\n\\t\\tdescription: \\\"策略配置不存在\\\",\\n\\t\\tparameters: make(map[string]interface{}),\\n\\t}\\n}\\n\\n// Execute 执行短线策略\\nfunc (s *ShortTermStrategy) Execute(stock *model.Stock, dailyData []model.StockDailyData, indicators []model.TechnicalIndicator) *model.StrategyResult {\\n\\tif len(dailyData) < 60 {\\n\\t\\treturn nil // 数据不足\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\tvar result *model.StrategyResult\\n\\n\\tswitch s.name {\\n\\tcase \\\"均线回踩低吸\\\":\\n\\t\\tresult = s.executeMAPullbackStrategy(stock, dailyData, indicators)\\n\\tcase \\\"突破缩量回踩\\\":\\n\\t\\tresult = s.executeBreakoutPullbackStrategy(stock, dailyData, indicators)\\n\\tcase \\\"强势股10日线反抽\\\":\\n\\t\\tresult = s.executeStrongStockReboundStrategy(stock, dailyData, indicators)\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\treturn result\\n}\\n\\n// executeMAPullbackStrategy 均线回踩低吸策略\\nfunc (s *ShortTermStrategy) executeMAPullbackStrategy(stock *model.Stock, dailyData []model.StockDailyData, indicators []model.TechnicalIndicator) *model.StrategyResult {\\n\\tlatestData := dailyData[len(dailyData)-1]\\n\\n\\t// 1. 检查流动性\\n\\tminTurnover := s.parameters[\\\"min_turnover\\\"].(float64)\\n\\tif latestData.Amount < minTurnover {\\n\\t\\treturn nil\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\t// 2. 计算移动平均线\\n\\tma5 := s.calculateMA(dailyData, 5)\\n\\tma10 := s.calculateMA(dailyData, 10)\\n\\tma20 := s.calculateMA(dailyData, 20)\\n\\n\\tif ma20 == 0 || ma10 == 0 || ma5 == 0 {\\n\\t\\treturn nil\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\t// 3. 检查20日线趋势向上\\n\\tma20Trend := s.checkMATrend(dailyData, 20)\\n\\tif !ma20Trend {\\n\\t\\treturn nil\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\t// 4. 检查股价在20日线上方\\n\\tif latestData.ClosePrice <= ma20 {\\n\\t\\treturn nil\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\t// 5. 检查回踩5/10日线\\n\\tmaxPriceRatio := s.parameters[\\\"max_price_ratio\\\"].(float64)\\n\\ttouchingMA5 := math.Abs(latestData.ClosePrice-ma5)/ma5 <= maxPriceRatio\\n\\ttouchingMA10 := math.Abs(latestData.ClosePrice-ma10)/ma10 <= maxPriceRatio\\n\\n\\tif !touchingMA5 && !touchingMA10 {\\n\\t\\treturn nil\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\t// 6. 检查成交量特征\\n\\tvolumeRatio := s.parameters[\\\"volume_ratio\\\"].(float64)\\n\\tvolumeOK := s.checkVolumePattern(dailyData, volumeRatio)\\n\\tif !volumeOK {\\n\\t\\treturn nil\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\t// 7. 计算策略评分\\n\\tscore := s.calculateMAPullbackScore(latestData, ma5, ma10, ma20, touchingMA5, touchingMA10)\\n\\n\\tif score < 0.6 {\\n\\t\\treturn nil\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\t// 8. 生成买卖点建议\\n\\tbuyPrice := latestData.ClosePrice\\n\\tstopLoss := buyPrice * 0.93 // -7%止损\\n\\ttakeProfit := buyPrice * 1.08 // +8%止盈\\n\\n\\tlogic := fmt.Sprintf(\\\"股价在20日线上方，20日线向上趋势，回踩%s均线企稳，成交量温和放大\\\",\\n\\t\\tfunc() string {\\n\\t\\t\\tif touchingMA5 {\\n\\t\\t\\t\\treturn \\\"5日\\\"\\n\\t\\t\\t}\\n\\t\\t\\treturn \\\"10日\\\"\\n\\t\\t}(),\\n\\t)\\n\\n\\treturn &model.StrategyResult{\\n\\t\\tStockCode: stock.Code,\\n\\t\\tScore: score,\\n\\t\\tBuyPrice: buyPrice,\\n\\t\\tStopLossPrice: stopLoss,\\n\\t\\tTakeProfitPrice: takeProfit,\\n\\t\\tLogicDescription: logic,\\n\\t}\\n}\\n\\n// executeBreakoutPullbackStrategy 突破缩量回踩策略\\nfunc (s *ShortTermStrategy) executeBreakoutPullbackStrategy(stock *model.Stock, dailyData []model.StockDailyData, indicators []model.TechnicalIndicator) *model.StrategyResult {\\n\\tlatestData := dailyData[len(dailyData)-1]\\n\\n\\t// 1. 检查箱体震荡\\n\\tboxPeriod := s.parameters[\\\"box_period\\\"].(int)\\n\\tif len(dailyData) < boxPeriod {\\n\\t\\treturn nil\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\tboxData := dailyData[len(dailyData)-boxPeriod:]\\n\\tboxHigh, boxLow := s.findBoxRange(boxData)\\n\\n\\t// 2. 检查突破\\n\\tbreakoutVolumeRatio := s.parameters[\\\"breakout_volume_ratio\\\"].(float64)\\n\\tbreakoutOK := s.checkBreakout(boxData, boxHigh, breakoutVolumeRatio)\\n\\tif !breakoutOK {\\n\\t\\treturn nil\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\t// 3. 检查回踩\\n\\tsupportLevelRatio := s.parameters[\\\"support_level_ratio\\\"].(float64)\\n\\tpullbackVolumeRatio := s.parameters[\\\"pullback_volume_ratio\\\"].(float64)\\n\\tpullbackOK := s.checkPullback(latestData, boxHigh, supportLevelRatio, pullbackVolumeRatio)\\n\\tif !pullbackOK {\\n\\t\\treturn nil\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\t// 4. 计算评分\\n\\tscore := s.calculateBreakoutScore(latestData, boxHigh, boxLow)\\n\\n\\tif score < 0.6 {\\n\\t\\treturn nil\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\t// 5. 生成买卖点建议\\n\\tbuyPrice := latestData.ClosePrice\\n\\tstopLoss := boxLow * 0.98 // 跌破箱体下沿止损\\n\\ttakeProfit := buyPrice * 1.07 // +7%止盈\\n\\n\\tlogic := \\\"平台突破后缩量回踩，原压力位转为支撑位，确认支撑有效\\\"\\n\\n\\treturn &model.StrategyResult{\\n\\t\\tStockCode: stock.Code,\\n\\t\\tScore: score,\\n\\t\\tBuyPrice: buyPrice,\\n\\t\\tStopLossPrice: stopLoss,\\n\\t\\tTakeProfitPrice: takeProfit,\\n\\t\\tLogicDescription: logic,\\n\\t}\\n}\\n\\n// executeStrongStockReboundStrategy 强势股10日线反抽策略\\nfunc (s *ShortTermStrategy) executeStrongStockReboundStrategy(stock *model.Stock, dailyData []model.StockDailyData, indicators []model.TechnicalIndicator) *model.StrategyResult {\\n\\tlatestData := dailyData[len(dailyData)-1]\\n\\n\\t// 1. 检查相对强度\\n\\tcomparePeriod := s.parameters[\\\"compare_period\\\"].(int)\\n\\tminOutperform := s.parameters[\\\"min_outperform\\\"].(float64)\\n\\tstrongOK := s.checkStockStrength(stock, dailyData, comparePeriod, minOutperform)\\n\\tif !strongOK {\\n\\t\\treturn nil\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\t// 2. 检查回调幅度\\n\\tmaxPullbackRatio := s.parameters[\\\"max_pullback_ratio\\\"].(float64)\\n\\tpullbackOK := s.checkPullbackMagnitude(dailyData, maxPullbackRatio)\\n\\tif !pullbackOK {\\n\\t\\treturn nil\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\t// 3. 检查10日线支撑\\n\\tsupportMA := s.parameters[\\\"support_ma\\\"].(int)\\n\\tmaValue := s.calculateMA(dailyData, supportMA)\\n\\tif maValue == 0 {\\n\\t\\treturn nil\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\tsupportRatio := 0.02 // 2%支撑范围\\n\\tif math.Abs(latestData.ClosePrice-maValue)/maValue > supportRatio {\\n\\t\\treturn nil\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\t// 4. 检查K线形态（收阳）\\n\\tif latestData.ClosePrice <= latestData.OpenPrice {\\n\\t\\treturn nil\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\t// 5. 计算评分\\n\\tscore := s.calculateReboundScore(latestData, maValue)\\n\\n\\tif score < 0.6 {\\n\\t\\treturn nil\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\t// 6. 生成买卖点建议\\n\\tbuyPrice := latestData.ClosePrice\\n\\tstopLoss := maValue * 0.97 // 跌破均线3%止损\\n\\ttakeProfit := buyPrice * 1.06 // +6%止盈\\n\\n\\tlogic := fmt.Sprintf(\\\"强势股第一次回踩%d日线收阳，出现承接迹象\\\", supportMA)\\n\\n\\treturn &model.StrategyResult{\\n\\t\\tStockCode: stock.Code,\\n\\t\\tScore: score,\\n\\t\\tBuyPrice: buyPrice,\\n\\t\\tStopLossPrice: stopLoss,\\n\\t\\tTakeProfitPrice: takeProfit,\\n\\t\\tLogicDescription: logic,\\n\\t}\\n}\\n\\n// calculateMA 计算移动平均线\\nfunc (s *ShortTermStrategy) calculateMA(dailyData []model.StockDailyData, period int) float64 {\\n\\tif len(dailyData) < period {\\n\\t\\treturn 0\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\tvar sum float64\\n\\tfor i := len(dailyData) - period; i < len(dailyData); i++ {\\n\\t\\tsum += dailyData[i].ClosePrice\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\treturn sum / float64(period)\\n}\\n\\n// checkMATrend 检查移动平均线趋势\\nfunc (s *ShortTermStrategy) checkMATrend(dailyData []model.StockDailyData, period int) bool {\\n\\tif len(dailyData) < period*2 {\\n\\t\\treturn false\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\t// 计算当前MA和之前MA\\n\\tcurrentMA := s.calculateMA(dailyData, period)\\n\\tpreviousData := dailyData[:len(dailyData)-10] // 10天前的数据\\n\\tif len(previousData) < period {\\n\\t\\treturn false\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\tpreviousMA := s.calculateMA(previousData, period)\\n\\n\\treturn currentMA > previousMA\\n}\\n\\n// checkVolumePattern 检查成交量模式\\nfunc (s *ShortTermStrategy) checkVolumePattern(dailyData []model.StockDailyData, minRatio float64) bool {\\n\\tif len(dailyData) < 10 {\\n\\t\\treturn false\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\t// 计算最近5日平均成交量\\n\\tvar recentSum int64\\n\\tfor i := len(dailyData) - 5; i < len(dailyData); i++ {\\n\\t\\trecentSum += dailyData[i].Volume\\n\\t}\\n\\trecentAvg := float64(recentSum) / 5.0\\n\\n\\t// 计算之前5日平均成交量\\n\\tvar previousSum int64\\n\\tfor i := len(dailyData) - 10; i < len(dailyData)-5; i++ {\\n\\t\\tpreviousSum += dailyData[i].Volume\\n\\t}\\n\\tpreviousAvg := float64(previousSum) / 5.0\\n\\n\\tif previousAvg == 0 {\\n\\t\\treturn false\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\treturn recentAvg/previousAvg >= minRatio\\n}\\n\\n// findBoxRange 寻找箱体范围\\nfunc (s *ShortTermStrategy) findBoxRange(dailyData []model.StockDailyData) (float64, float64) {\\n\\tvar high, low float64\\n\\tif len(dailyData) == 0 {\\n\\t\\treturn 0, 0\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\thigh = dailyData[0].HighPrice\\n\\tlow = dailyData[0].LowPrice\\n\\n\\tfor _, data := range dailyData {\\n\\t\\tif data.HighPrice > high {\\n\\t\\t\\thigh = data.HighPrice\\n\\t\\t}\\n\\t\\tif data.LowPrice < low {\\n\\t\\t\\tlow = data.LowPrice\\n\\t\\t}\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\treturn high, low\\n}\\n\\n// checkBreakout 检查突破\\nfunc (s *ShortTermStrategy) checkBreakout(dailyData []model.StockDailyData, boxHigh float64, volumeRatio float64) bool {\\n\\tfor i, data := range dailyData {\\n\\t\\t// 检查是否突破箱体上沿\\n\\t\\tif data.HighPrice > boxHigh {\\n\\t\\t\\t// 检查突破当天的成交量\\n\\t\\t\\tif i > 0 && float64(data.Volume) > float64(dailyData[i-1].Volume)*volumeRatio {\\n\\t\\t\\t\\treturn true\\n\\t\\t\\t}\\n\\t\\t}\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\treturn false\\n}\\n\\n// checkPullback 检查回踩\\nfunc (s *ShortTermStrategy) checkPullback(latestData model.StockDailyData, supportLevel float64, ratio float64, volumeRatio float64) bool {\\n\\t// 检查价格是否在支撑位附近\\n\\tpriceDiff := math.Abs(latestData.ClosePrice-supportLevel) / supportLevel\\n\\tif priceDiff > ratio {\\n\\t\\treturn false\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\t// 检查成交量是否缩量\\n\\t// 这里需要更多数据来判断，暂时返回true\\n\\treturn true\\n}\\n\\n// checkStockStrength 检查股票相对强度\\nfunc (s *ShortTermStrategy) checkStockStrength(stock *model.Stock, dailyData []model.StockDailyData, period int, minOutperform float64) bool {\\n\\t// 简化实现：检查近期涨幅\\n\\tif len(dailyData) < period {\\n\\t\\treturn false\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\tstartPrice := dailyData[len(dailyData)-period].ClosePrice\\n\\tendPrice := dailyData[len(dailyData)-1].ClosePrice\\n\\n\\tif startPrice == 0 {\\n\\t\\treturn false\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\treturn (endPrice-startPrice)/startPrice >= minOutperform\\n}\\n\\n// checkPullbackMagnitude 检查回调幅度\\nfunc (s *ShortTermStrategy) checkPullbackMagnitude(dailyData []model.StockDailyData, maxRatio float64) bool {\\n\\tif len(dailyData) < 10 {\\n\\t\\treturn false\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\t// 找到近期高点\\n\\trecentHigh := dailyData[len(dailyData)-1].HighPrice\\n\\tfor i := len(dailyData) - 10; i < len(dailyData); i++ {\\n\\t\\tif dailyData[i].HighPrice > recentHigh {\\n\\t\\t\\trecentHigh = dailyData[i].HighPrice\\n\\t\\t}\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\tcurrentPrice := dailyData[len(dailyData)-1].ClosePrice\\n\\tif recentHigh == 0 {\\n\\t\\treturn false\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\tpullbackRatio := (recentHigh - currentPrice) / recentHigh\\n\\treturn pullbackRatio <= maxRatio\\n}\\n\\n// calculateMAPullbackScore 计算均线回踩策略评分\\nfunc (s *ShortTermStrategy) calculateMAPullbackScore(data model.StockDailyData, ma5, ma10, ma20 float64, touchingMA5, touchingMA10 bool) float64 {\\n\\tscore := 0.5\\n\\n\\t// 均线多头排列加分\\n\\tif ma5 > ma10 && ma10 > ma20 {\\n\\t\\tscore += 0.2\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\t// 回踩5日线比10日线评分高\\n\\tif touchingMA5 {\\n\\t\\tscore += 0.15\\n\\t} else if touchingMA10 {\\n\\t\\tscore += 0.1\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\t// 成交量配合加分\\n\\tif data.Volume > data.Amount/float64(data.ClosePrice)*0.8 { // 简化成交量判断\\n\\t\\tscore += 0.1\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\t// 价格位置评分\\n\\tpositionScore := (data.ClosePrice - ma20) / ma20\\n\\tif positionScore > 0 && positionScore < 0.1 { // 在20日线上方10%以内\\n\\t\\tscore += 0.05\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\treturn math.Min(score, 1.0)\\n}\\n\\n// calculateBreakoutScore 计算突破回踩策略评分\\nfunc (s *ShortTermStrategy) calculateBreakoutScore(data model.StockDailyData, boxHigh, boxLow float64) float64 {\\n\\tscore := 0.5\\n\\n\\t// 突破幅度评分\\n\\tbreakoutRatio := (data.ClosePrice - boxHigh) / boxHigh\\n\\tif breakoutRatio > 0.05 { // 突破5%以上\\n\\t\\tscore += 0.2\\n\\t} else if breakoutRatio > 0.02 { // 突破2%以上\\n\\t\\tscore += 0.1\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\t// 箱体高度评分\\n\\tboxHeight := (boxHigh - boxLow) / boxLow\\n\\tif boxHeight > 0.1 && boxHeight < 0.3 { // 箱体高度10%-30%\\n\\t\\tscore += 0.15\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\t// 成交量评分\\n\\tif data.Volume > 0 { // 简化评分\\n\\t\\tscore += 0.1\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\treturn math.Min(score, 1.0)\\n}\\n\\n// calculateReboundScore 计算反抽策略评分\\nfunc (s *ShortTermStrategy) calculateReboundScore(data model.StockDailyData, maValue float64) float64 {\\n\\tscore := 0.5\\n\\n\\t// K线形态评分（阳线）\\n\\tif data.ClosePrice > data.OpenPrice {\\n\\t\\tscore += 0.15\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\t// 下影线评分\\n\\tshadowRatio := (data.ClosePrice - data.LowPrice) / (data.HighPrice - data.LowPrice)\\n\\tif shadowRatio > 0.3 { // 下影线较长\\n\\t\\tscore += 0.1\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\t// 均线支撑评分\\n\\tsupportRatio := math.Abs(data.ClosePrice-maValue) / maValue\\n\\tif supportRatio < 0.02 { // 距离均线2%以内\\n\\t\\tscore += 0.15\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\treturn math.Min(score, 1.0)\\n}\\n\\n// GetName 获取策略名称\\nfunc (s *ShortTermStrategy) GetName() string {\\n\\treturn s.name\\n}\\n\\n// GetDescription 获取策略描述\\nfunc (s *ShortTermStrategy) GetDescription() string {\\n\\treturn s.description\\n}\\n\\n// GetParameters 获取策略参数\\nfunc (s *ShortTermStrategy) GetParameters() map[string]interface{} {\\n\\treturn s.parameters\\n}\\n... \"package strategy\\n\\nimport (\\n\\t\\\"fmt\\\"\\n\\t\\\"math\\\"\\n\\t\\\"time\\\"\\n\\n\\t\\\"stock-strategy-backend/model\\\"\\n)\\n\\n// LongTermStrategy 长线策略引擎\\ntype LongTermStrategy struct {\\n\\tname string\\n\\tdescription string\\n\\tparameters map[string]interface{}\\n}\\n\\n// NewLongTermStrategy 创建长线策略实例\\nfunc NewLongTermStrategy(strategyID string) *LongTermStrategy {\\n\\tstrategies := map[string]*LongTermStrategy{\\n\\t\\t\\\"long_term_1\\\": {\\n\\t\\t\\tname: \\\"价值投资低估值\\\",\\n\\t\\t\\tdescription: \\\"寻找被低估的优质股票，PE/PB低于行业平均，ROE稳定，股息率高\\\",\\n\\t\\t\\tparameters: map[string]interface{}{\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\\"pe_threshold\\\": 15.0, // PE低于15\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\\"pb_threshold\\\": 2.0, // PB低于2\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\\"roe_threshold\\\": 10.0, // ROE大于10%\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\\"dividend_yield\\\": 3.0, // 股息率大于3%\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\\"debt_ratio_max\\\": 0.6, // 负债率小于60%\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\\"hold_period\\\": 252, // 持有期约1年(交易日)\\n\\t\\t\\t},\\n\\t\\t},\\n\\t\\t\\\"long_term_2\\\": {\\n\\t\\t\\tname: \\\"成长股长期持有\\\",\\n\\t\\t\\tdescription: \\\"选择高成长股，营收/利润持续增长，行业前景好，适合3-5年持有\\\",\\n\\t\\t\\tparameters: map[string]interface{}{\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\\"revenue_growth_min\\\": 0.2, // 营收增长>20%\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\\"profit_growth_min\\\": 0.15, // 利润增长>15%\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\\"roe_min\\\": 15.0, // ROE>15%\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\\"market_share\\\": 0.1, // 市场份额>10%\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\\"industry_growth\\\": 0.1, // 行业增长>10%\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\\"hold_period\\\": 504, // 持有期约2年(交易日)\\n\\t\\t\\t},\\n\\t\\t},\\n\\t\\t\\\"long_term_3\\\": {\\n\\t\\t\\tname: \\\"龙头股长期配置\\\",\\n\\t\\t\\tdescription: \\\"行业龙头股，竞争优势明显，长期趋势向上，适合长期配置\\\",\\n\\t\\t\\tparameters: map[string]interface{}{\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\\"market_cap_min\\\": 10000000000.0, // 市值>100亿\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\\"industry_rank\\\": 3, // 行业排名前3\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\\"roe_stable\\\": 8.0, // ROE稳定>8%\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\\"profit_stable\\\": 5, // 连续5年盈利\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\\"ma200_trend\\\": true, // 200日均线向上\\n\\t\\t\\t\\t\\\"hold_period\\\": 756, // 持有期约3年(交易日)\\n\\t\\t\\t},\\n\\t\\t},\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\tif strategy, exists := strategies[strategyID]; exists {\\n\\t\\treturn strategy\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\treturn &LongTermStrategy{\\n\\t\\tname: \\\"未知长线策略\\\",\\n\\t\\tdescription: \\\"策略配置不存在\\\",\\n\\t\\tparameters: make(map[string]interface{}),\\n\\t}\\n}\\n\\n// Execute 执行长线策略\\nfunc (s *LongTermStrategy) Execute(stock *model.Stock, dailyData []model.StockDailyData, financialData *model.FinancialData, indicators []model.TechnicalIndicator) *model.StrategyResult {\\n\\tif len(dailyData) < 250 { // 至少需要1年数据\\n\\t\\treturn nil\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\tvar result *model.StrategyResult\\n\\n\\tswitch s.name {\\n\\tcase \\\"价值投资低估值\\\":\\n\\t\\tresult = s.executeValueStrategy(stock, dailyData, financialData, indicators)\\n\\tcase \\\"成长股长期持有\\\":\\n\\t\\tresult = s.executeGrowthStrategy(stock, dailyData, financialData, indicators)\\n\\tcase \\\"龙头股长期配置\\\":\\n\\t\\tresult = s.executeLeaderStrategy(stock, dailyData, financialData, indicators)\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\treturn result\\n}\\n\\n// executeValueStrategy 价值投资策略\\nfunc (s *LongTermStrategy) executeValueStrategy(stock *model.Stock, dailyData []model.StockDailyData, financialData *model.FinancialData, indicators []model.TechnicalIndicator) *model.StrategyResult {\\n\\tlatestData := dailyData[len(dailyData)-1]\\n\\n\\t// 1. 检查估值条件\\n\\tif !s.checkValuationConditions(financialData) {\\n\\t\\treturn nil\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\t// 2. 检查财务健康\\n\\tif !s.checkFinancialHealth(financialData) {\\n\\t\\treturn nil\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\t// 3. 检查股息率\\n\\tif !s.checkDividendCondition(financialData) {\\n\\t\\treturn nil\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\t// 4. 检查长期趋势\\n\\tif !s.checkLongTermTrend(dailyData) {\\n\\t\\treturn nil\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\t// 5. 计算评分\\n\\tscore := s.calculateValueScore(latestData, financialData, indicators)\\n\\n\\tif score < 0.6 {\\n\\t\\treturn nil\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\t// 6. 生成买卖点建议（长线策略更注重安全边际）\\n\\tbuyPrice := latestData.ClosePrice\\n\\tstopLoss := buyPrice * 0.80 // 长线止损较宽：-20%\\n\\ttakeProfit := buyPrice * 1.50 // 长线止盈较高：+50%\\n\\n\\tlogic := fmt.Sprintf(\\\"低估值价值股，PE=%.1f,PB=%.1f,ROE=%.1f%%,股息率=%.2f%%\\\",\\n\\t\\tfinancialData.PE, financialData.PB, financialData.ROE, financialData.DividendYield)\\n\\n\\treturn &model.StrategyResult{\\n\\t\\tStockCode: stock.Code,\\n\\t\\tScore: score,\\n\\t\\tBuyPrice: buyPrice,\\n\\t\\tStopLossPrice: stopLoss,\\n\\t\\tTakeProfitPrice: takeProfit,\\n\\t\\tLogicDescription: logic,\\n\\t}\\n}\\n\\n// executeGrowthStrategy 成长股策略\\nfunc (s *LongTermStrategy) executeGrowthStrategy(stock *model.Stock, dailyData []model.StockDailyData, financialData *model.FinancialData, indicators []model.TechnicalIndicator) *model.StrategyResult {\\n\\tlatestData := dailyData[len(dailyData)-1]\\n\\n\\t// 1. 检查成长性\\n\\tif !s.checkGrowthConditions(financialData) {\\n\\t\\treturn nil\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\t// 2. 检查盈利能力\\n\\tif !s.checkProfitability(financialData) {\\n\\t\\treturn nil\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\t// 3. 检查行业前景\\n\\tif !s.checkIndustryProspect(stock.Industry) {\\n\\t\\treturn nil\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\t// 4. 检查技术面趋势\\n\\tif !s.checkLongTermTrend(dailyData) {\\n\\t\\treturn nil\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\t// 5. 计算评分\\n\\tscore := s.calculateGrowthScore(latestData, financialData, indicators)\\n\\n\\tif score < 0.6 {\\n\\t\\treturn nil\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\t// 6. 生成买卖点建议\\n\\tbuyPrice := latestData.ClosePrice\\n\\tstopLoss := buyPrice * 0.75 // 成长股波动大，止损更宽：-25%\\n\\ttakeProfit := buyPrice * 2.00 // 成长股目标收益高：+100%\\n\\n\\tlogic := fmt.Sprintf(\\\"高成长股，营收增长%.1f%%,利润增长%.1f%%,ROE=%.1f%%\\\",\\n\\t\\tfinancialData.RevenueGrowth*100, financialData.ProfitGrowth*100, financialData.ROE)\\n\\n\\treturn &model.StrategyResult{\\n\\t\\tStockCode: stock.Code,\\n\\t\\tScore: score,\\n\\t\\tBuyPrice: buyPrice,\\n\\t\\tStopLossPrice: stopLoss,\\n\\t\\tTakeProfitPrice: takeProfit,\\n\\t\\tLogicDescription: logic,\\n\\t}\\n}\\n\\n// executeLeaderStrategy 龙头股策略\\nfunc (s *LongTermStrategy) executeLeaderStrategy(stock *model.Stock, dailyData []model.StockDailyData, financialData *model.FinancialData, indicators []model.TechnicalIndicator) *model.StrategyResult {\\n\\tlatestData := dailyData[len(dailyData)-1]\\n\\n\\t// 1. 检查市值规模\\n\\tif !s.checkMarketCap(stock, latestData) {\\n\\t\\treturn nil\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\t// 2. 检查盈利能力稳定性\\n\\tif !s.checkStability(financialData) {\\n\\t\\treturn nil\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\t// 3. 检查竞争优势（简化：通过ROE和利润率判断）\\n\\tif !s.checkCompetitiveAdvantage(financialData) {\\n\\t\\treturn nil\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\t// 4. 检查长期趋势\\n\\tif !s.checkLongTermTrend(dailyData) {\\n\\t\\treturn nil\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\t// 5. 计算评分\\n\\tscore := s.calculateLeaderScore(latestData, dailyData, financialData, indicators)\\n\\n\\tif score < 0.6 {\\n\\t\\treturn nil\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\t// 6. 生成买卖点建议\\n\\tbuyPrice := latestData.ClosePrice\\n\\tstopLoss := buyPrice * 0.85 // 龙头股相对稳健：-15%\\n\\ttakeProfit := buyPrice * 1.80 // 龙头股长期收益：+80%\\n\\n\\tlogic := fmt.Sprintf(\\\"行业龙头股，市值%.0f亿,ROE=%.1f%%,长期趋势向上\\\",\\n\\t\\tlatestData.ClosePrice*100000000/100000000, financialData.ROE) // 简化市值计算\\n\\n\\treturn &model.StrategyResult{\\n\\t\\tStockCode: stock.Code,\\n\\t\\tScore: score,\\n\\t\\tBuyPrice: buyPrice,\\n\\t\\tStopLossPrice: stopLoss,\\n\\t\\tTakeProfitPrice: takeProfit,\\n\\t\\tLogicDescription: logic,\\n\\t}\\n}\\n\\n// checkValuationConditions 检查估值条件\\nfunc (s *LongTermStrategy) checkValuationConditions(financialData *model.FinancialData) bool {\\n\\tif financialData == nil {\\n\\t\\treturn false\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\tpeThreshold := s.parameters[\\\"pe_threshold\\\"].(float64)\\n\\tpbThreshold := s.parameters[\\\"pb_threshold\\\"].(float64)\\n\\n\\treturn financialData.PE > 0 && financialData.PE < peThreshold &&\\n\\t\\tfinancialData.PB > 0 && financialData.PB < pbThreshold\\n}\\n\\n// checkFinancialHealth 检查财务健康\\nfunc (s *LongTermStrategy) checkFinancialHealth(financialData *model.FinancialData) bool {\\n\\tif financialData == nil {\\n\\t\\treturn false\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\troeThreshold := s.parameters[\\\"roe_threshold\\\"].(float64)\\n\\tdebtRatioMax := s.parameters[\\\"debt_ratio_max\\\"].(float64)\\n\\n\\treturn financialData.ROE >= roeThreshold && financialData.DebtRatio <= debtRatioMax\\n}\\n\\n// checkDividendCondition 检查股息率条件\\nfunc (s *LongTermStrategy) checkDividendCondition(financialData *model.FinancialData) bool {\\n\\tif financialData == nil {\\n\\t\\treturn false\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\tdividendYield := s.parameters[\\\"dividend_yield\\\"].(float64)\\n\\treturn financialData.DividendYield >= dividendYield\\n}\\n\\n// checkLongTermTrend 检查长期趋势\\nfunc (s *LongTermStrategy) checkLongTermTrend(dailyData []model.StockDailyData) bool {\\n\\tif len(dailyData) < 200 {\\n\\t\\treturn false\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\t// 计算200日均线趋势\\n\\tma200 := s.calculateMA(dailyData, 200)\\n\\tma100 := s.calculateMA(dailyData, 100)\\n\\n\\tif ma200 == 0 || ma100 == 0 {\\n\\t\\treturn false\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\t// 长期趋势向上：100日均线 > 200日均线\\n\\treturn ma100 > ma200\\n}\\n\\n// checkGrowthConditions 检查成长性条件\\nfunc (s *LongTermStrategy) checkGrowthConditions(financialData *model.FinancialData) bool {\\n\\tif financialData == nil {\\n\\t\\treturn false\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\trevenueGrowthMin := s.parameters[\\\"revenue_growth_min\\\"].(float64)\\n\\tprofitGrowthMin := s.parameters[\\\"profit_growth_min\\\"].(float64)\\n\\n\\treturn financialData.RevenueGrowth >= revenueGrowthMin &&\\n\\t\\tfinancialData.ProfitGrowth >= profitGrowthMin\\n}\\n\\n// checkProfitability 检查盈利能力\\nfunc (s *LongTermStrategy) checkProfitability(financialData *model.FinancialData) bool {\\n\\tif financialData == nil {\\n\\t\\treturn false\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\troeMin := s.parameters[\\\"roe_min\\\"].(float64)\\n\\treturn financialData.ROE >= roeMin && financialData.NetMargin > 0\\n}\\n\\n// checkIndustryProspect 检查行业前景\\nfunc (s *LongTermStrategy) checkIndustryProspect(industry string) bool {\\n\\t// 简化实现：假设所有行业都有前景\\n\\t// 实际应该根据行业数据判断\\n\\treturn len(industry) > 0\\n}\\n\\n// checkMarketCap 检查市值规模\\nfunc (s *LongTermStrategy) checkMarketCap(stock *model.Stock, latestData model.StockDailyData) bool {\\n\\t// 简化实现：通过价格判断（实际应该从财务数据获取市值）\\n\\t// 这里暂时返回true\\n\\treturn true\\n}\\n\\n// checkStability 检查稳定性\\nfunc (s *LongTermStrategy) checkStability(financialData *model.FinancialData) bool {\\n\\tif financialData == nil {\\n\\t\\treturn false\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\troeStable := s.parameters[\\\"roe_stable\\\"].(float64)\\n\\t// profitStable := s.parameters[\\\"profit_stable\\\"].(int) // 暂时未使用，保留以备将来扩展\\n\\n\\t// 简化实现：检查ROE是否稳定\\n\\treturn financialData.ROE >= roeStable\\n}\\n\\n// checkCompetitiveAdvantage 检查竞争优势\\nfunc (s *LongTermStrategy) checkCompetitiveAdvantage(financialData *model.FinancialData) bool {\\n\\tif financialData == nil {\\n\\t\\treturn false\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\t// 通过高ROE和净利率判断竞争优势\\n\\treturn financialData.ROE >= 12.0 && financialData.NetMargin >= 5.0\\n}\\n\\n// calculateMA 计算移动平均线\\nfunc (s *LongTermStrategy) calculateMA(dailyData []model.StockDailyData, period int) float64 {\\n\\tif len(dailyData) < period {\\n\\t\\treturn 0\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\tvar sum float64\\n\\tfor i := len(dailyData) - period; i < len(dailyData); i++ {\\n\\t\\tsum += dailyData[i].ClosePrice\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\treturn sum / float64(period)\\n}\\n\\n// calculateValueScore 计算价值投资策略评分\\nfunc (s *LongTermStrategy) calculateValueScore(data model.StockDailyData, financialData *model.FinancialData, indicators []model.TechnicalIndicator) float64 {\\n\\tscore := 0.5\\n\\n\\t// 估值评分\\n\\tif financialData != nil {\\n\\t\\tif financialData.PE < 10 {\\n\\t\\t\\tscore += 0.15\\n\\t\\t} else if financialData.PE < 15 {\\n\\t\\t\\tscore += 0.1\\n\\t\\t}\\n\\n\\t\\tif financialData.PB < 1.5 {\\n\\t\\t\\tscore += 0.1\\n\\t\\t} else if financialData.PB < 2.0 {\\n\\t\\t\\tscore += 0.05\\n\\t\\t}\\n\\n\\t\\t// 股息率评分\\n\\t\\tif financialData.DividendYield >= 5.0 {\\n\\t\\t\\tscore += 0.15\\n\\t\\t} else if financialData.DividendYield >= 3.0 {\\n\\t\\t\\tscore += 0.1\\n\\t\\t}\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\t// 财务健康评分\\n\\tif financialData != nil && financialData.DebtRatio < 0.5 {\\n\\t\\tscore += 0.1\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\treturn math.Min(score, 1.0)\\n}\\n\\n// calculateGrowthScore 计算成长股策略评分\\nfunc (s *LongTermStrategy) calculateGrowthScore(data model.StockDailyData, financialData *model.FinancialData, indicators []model.TechnicalIndicator) float64 {\\n\\tscore := 0.5\\n\\n\\t// 成长性评分\\n\\tif financialData != nil {\\n\\t\\tif financialData.RevenueGrowth >= 0.3 {\\n\\t\\t\\tscore += 0.2\\n\\t\\t} else if financialData.RevenueGrowth >= 0.2 {\\n\\t\\t\\tscore += 0.15\\n\\t\\t}\\n\\n\\t\\tif financialData.ProfitGrowth >= 0.25 {\\n\\t\\t\\tscore += 0.15\\n\\t\\t} else if financialData.ProfitGrowth >= 0.15 {\\n\\t\\t\\tscore += 0.1\\n\\t\\t}\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\t// 盈利能力评分\\n\\tif financialData != nil && financialData.ROE >= 20 {\\n\\t\\tscore += 0.1\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\treturn math.Min(score, 1.0)\\n}\\n\\n// calculateLeaderScore 计算龙头股策略评分\\nfunc (s *LongTermStrategy) calculateLeaderScore(data model.StockDailyData, dailyData []model.StockDailyData, financialData *model.FinancialData, indicators []model.TechnicalIndicator) float64 {\\n\\tscore := 0.5\\n\\n\\t// 稳定性评分\\n\\tif financialData != nil {\\n\\t\\tif financialData.ROE >= 15 {\\n\\t\\t\\tscore += 0.15\\n\\t\\t} else if financialData.ROE >= 10 {\\n\\t\\t\\tscore += 0.1\\n\\t\\t}\\n\\n\\t\\tif financialData.NetMargin >= 10 {\\n\\t\\t\\tscore += 0.1\\n\\t\\t}\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\t// 趋势评分\\n\\tma200 := s.calculateMA(dailyData, 200)\\n\\tif ma200 > 0 && data.ClosePrice > ma200*1.2 { // 股价高于200日均线20%\\n\\t\\tscore += 0.15\\n\\t}\\n\\n\\treturn math.Min(score, 1.0)\\n}\\n\\n// GetName 获取策略名称\\nfunc (s *LongTermStrategy) GetName() string {\\n\\treturn s.name\\n}\\n\\n// GetDescription 获取策略描述\\nfunc (s *LongTermStrategy) GetDescription()
